meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Basic App Stagnation
content.seo_description: Learn to implement high-conversion user onboarding to overcome stagnant app development. An expert-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop building static interfaces that lose users. By implementing context-aware, state-driven onboarding, you transform basic CRUD apps into premium, high-retention experiences. Use Antigravity to scaffold the state machine and Claude Code to iterate on user flows, ensuring every deployment feels polished, professional, and ready for enterprise-grade client delivery.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting the logic, but your client’s users are dropping off before they even see the value. That’s the 'Basic App Trap': functional, yet devoid of the professional guidance that turns a tool into a habit. The difference between a junior developer and a high-ticket freelancer is the ability to bridge the gap between 'working' and 'welcoming.'

It’s time to stop treating onboarding as an afterthought. By integrating sophisticated, state-aware onboarding flows, you don't just build features—you engineer user success. With Antigravity and Claude Code, we aren't just writing code; we are orchestrating the user's journey to ensure they reach the 'Aha!' moment faster than ever before.

steps.title: Define the User Journey State Machine
steps.description: Map out the onboarding flow using a finite state machine to prevent logic leaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a robust, type-safe state machine for a multi-step user onboarding flow using XState patterns. Include transitions for 'skipped', 'completed', and 'in-progress' states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate the onboarding state machine schema based on the Antigravity output.'

steps.title: Build Contextual UI Components
steps.description: Create modular, reusable overlays that trigger based on the user's progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of React components for a guided tour overlay. Must include a 'next' button, 'skip' option, and a progress indicator that tracks state.

steps.title: Implement Event-Driven Persistence
steps.description: Ensure onboarding progress persists across sessions so users never repeat steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom hook 'useOnboardingPersistence' that syncs current state to local storage and a mock database API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the persistence layer using the provided hook pattern.'

steps.title: Integrate Behavioral Analytics Triggers
steps.description: Add silent tracking to measure where users drop off during the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event logging to the onboarding state machine transitions to track metrics for conversion optimization.

steps.title: Final Polish and Edge Case Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to stress-test the flow against unexpected user behavior.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the onboarding flow covering fast-clicking, browser refreshes, and network failure scenarios.

pro_tips: Always gate your onboarding behind a Feature Flag so you can toggle it off for power users without deploying new code.
Use 'micro-feedback' animations during onboarding steps; users perceive faster load times when the UI provides immediate haptic or visual response.
Never force a tour; provide a clear 'Skip' button that saves the user's preference to their profile settings immediately.
Tie onboarding completion to a 'Value Milestone' rather than just a feature walkthrough—ensure they reach a data-input stage early.
Leverage Claude Code to automatically generate 'Empty State' components that serve as a soft-onboarding for users who haven't populated their dashboard yet.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment and use heatmapping tools to verify if users are actually engaging with your guided steps.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for mediocre delivery and start shipping high-conversion experiences that clients pay a premium for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
